notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ernie Clement reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Gunnar Henderson. Jesús Sánchez to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Ward GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Blaze Alexander out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Taylor Ward rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Taylor Ward grounds into a double play, second baseman Ernie Clement to shortstop Andrés Giménez to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Blaze Alexander out at 2nd. Taylor Ward out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes singles on a ground ball to second baseman Jackson Holliday, deflected by pitcher Yennier Cano. Andrés Giménez scores.
